title: 10 best herbal teas for itchy ears
description: Taraxacum officinale, also known as dandelion, teas helps with itchy ears because of its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant's roots and leaves contain compounds like taraxasterol and sesquiterpene lactones, which have been shown to reduce inflammation and combat infections. When consumed as a tea, these compounds may help soothe and calm itchy ear symptoms, providing relief from discomfort and promoting a healthy balance of ear flora. Regular consumption may also...
